_doc: Pick which plan each track runs at next boot. Edit, then reboot both Pis (or `systemctl restart cpcbf-2_4ghz cpcbf-lora`). Set a track to null to skip it. Plan paths are relative to cpcbf/plans/field/; the .yaml suffix is optional. Both Pis must be on the same plan, with matching firmware already flashed on the matching MKR.
